grant_title: Community Food Projects Competitive Grants Program (CFPCGP)
geographic_restrictions: No geographic restrictions specified (open to eligible applicants nationwide)
project_area: Community food projects, including planning projects and community food projects focused on food and nutrition security, farmer education, food loss and waste, and nutrition and food systems
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned beyond eligibility criteria for applicant types
eligibility_summary: Public food program service providers, tribal organizations, private nonprofit entities (including gleaners) are eligible to apply. Matching funds are required. Projects must align with community food security goals.
